title: Calcup — Free Retro Pomodoro Timer, Tasks and Focus Sounds
confirm_reset: Are you sure you want to reset all data and settings?

tasks.title: Task Planner
tasks.no_active: Choose a task for the next focus block

dateTimer.title: Date Countdown
dateTimer.today_hint: Target is today — seconds matter now
dateTimer.expired_hint: Choose a new date to restart the countdown

credit.title: Loan Calculator
credit.intro: Estimate an annuity payment, total interest, early repayments, and a full payment schedule. Results are approximate and intended for preliminary comparison.

form.title: Loan parameters
form.annuityHelp: Annuity: the payment is usually the same each month; early payments contain more interest and less principal.
form.differentiatedHelp: Differentiated: principal is repaid in equal parts, so the first payment is higher and later payments gradually decrease.

results.title: Calculation result
results.fixErrors: Fix loan parameter errors to see a valid calculation.

print.disclaimer: This calculation is informational. Confirm actual loan terms, fees, and early repayment rules with your bank or loan agreement.

note.title: PDF without extra dependencies
note.body: The print button opens the browser system dialog. You can choose a printer or save the report as a PDF there.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.intro: Estimate down payment, loan amount, monthly payment, and total interest for a mortgage.

form.termsHelp: Enter property price, down payment, rate, and term. Use your own scenario for the rate.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Fill property price, down payment, rate, and term with valid values.

warning.title: Informational estimate
warning.body: The calculator uses an annuity payment and does not include fees, insurance, appraisal, subsidies, early repayments, or lender-specific terms.

mortgage.formula: Payment uses the annuity formula. Loan amount = property price − down payment. Interest paid = all payments − loan amount.

propertyPrice.required: Enter property price as a number.

downPaymentPercent.required: Enter down payment as a number.
downPaymentPercent.range: Down payment must be from 0 to 99%.

termYears.range: Term must be from 1 to 40 years.

deposit.title: Deposit Calculator
deposit.intro: Estimate deposit interest, final balance, and the effect of capitalization over a selected term.

form.termsHelp: Enter amount, annual rate, and term. Use the rate from your own bank offer.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Fill amount, rate, and term with valid values.

warning.title: Informational estimate
warning.body: The calculator does not include taxes, fees, additional contributions, partial withdrawals, bonus rates, or bank-specific terms.

deposit.formula: Without capitalization, income is proportional to the term. With monthly capitalization, interest is added to the deposit balance each month.

initialAmount.required: Enter deposit amount as a number.

termMonths.range: Term must be from 1 to 600 months.

compoundInterest.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compoundInterest.intro: Estimate capital growth with monthly compounding, regular contributions, and a selected term.

form.termsHelp: Enter starting amount, monthly contribution, rate, and term. Contributions are added at the end of each month.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Fill amount, contribution, rate, and term with valid values. Starting amount and contribution cannot both be zero.

warning.title: Informational estimate
warning.body: The calculator is not investment advice and does not include taxes, fees, inflation, risk, rate changes, or actual instrument performance.

compoundInterest.formula: Interest compounds monthly. The contribution is added at the end of the month after interest for that month is applied.

initialAmount.required: Enter starting amount as a number.
initialAmount.range: Starting amount must be from 0 to 1,000,000,000.

monthlyContribution.required: Enter monthly contribution as a number.

termYears.range: Term must be from 1 to 60 years.

refinance.title: Refinance Calculator
refinance.intro: Compare your current loan with a new offer: payment, total paid, savings, and payback of refinancing costs.

form.balanceHelp: Enter the current loan balance. The comparison calculates payments from this amount.

result.label: Comparison
result.empty: Fill balance, rates, terms, and costs with valid values.

warning.title: Informational estimate
warning.body: The calculator compares annuity scenarios and does not include penalties, insurance, schedule changes, early repayments, or lender-specific terms.

refinance.formula: Payments use the annuity formula. New total includes one-time refinancing costs. Payback = costs / monthly savings.

outstandingBalance.required: Enter loan balance as a number.

oldAnnualRate.required: Enter old rate as a number.

oldTermMonths.required: Enter remaining term as a number.
oldTermMonths.range: Term must be from 1 to 600 months.

newAnnualRate.required: Enter new rate as a number.

newTermMonths.required: Enter new term as a number.
newTermMonths.range: Term must be from 1 to 600 months.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator
bmi.intro: Enter height and weight to calculate body mass index and get a basic interpretation.

result.label: Your BMI
result.empty: Enter height from 50 to 250 cm and weight from 10 to 400 kg.

underweight.title: Underweight
underweight.description: BMI is below 18.5. Consider nutrition, wellbeing, and professional advice when needed.

normal.title: Normal weight
normal.description: BMI is in the 18.5-24.9 range. It is an informational marker and does not account for body composition.

overweight.title: Overweight
overweight.description: BMI is in the 25.0-29.9 range. The result is useful as a reference, not as a medical diagnosis.

obesity.title: Obesity
obesity.description: BMI is 30.0 or higher. Discuss individual health factors with a medical professional.

heightCm.range: Height must be from 50 to 250 cm.

weightKg.range: Weight must be from 10 to 400 kg.

disclaimer.title: Health disclaimer
disclaimer.body: BMI is an informational metric and does not account for age, sex, pregnancy, muscle mass, or medical context. Consult a clinician for diagnosis or personal recommendations.

calorie.title: Calorie Calculator
calorie.intro: Estimate basal metabolic rate, daily energy expenditure, and a calorie target for your selected goal.

form.profileHelp: The Mifflin-St Jeor formula uses sex, age, height, and weight.
form.activityHelp: Choose your usual week, not the hardest single day.
form.goalHelp: The goal adds or subtracts an approximate daily calorie difference.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter age 10-100, height 100-230 cm, and weight 30-300 kg.

warning.title: Informational estimate
warning.body: This calculator does not account for medical conditions, pregnancy, body composition, or clinician guidance. Do not use it as a diagnosis or personal nutrition plan.

calorie.formula: BMR uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation. TDEE = BMR × activity factor. The goal changes the total by -500, -250, 0, or +300 kcal per day.

heightCm.range: Height must be from 100 to 230 cm.

weightKg.range: Weight must be from 30 to 300 kg.

idealWeight.title: Ideal Weight Calculator
idealWeight.intro: Compare several classic weight formulas by height and sex and see an informational BMI range.

form.profileHelp: The formulas use height and sex. They do not account for age, body composition, or athletic build.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter height from 120 to 230 cm.

warning.title: Not a medical target
warning.body: Ideal weight formulas are informational estimates only. Body composition, muscle mass, pregnancy, age, and medical context can meaningfully change a healthy range.

idealWeight.formula: Devine, Robinson, Miller, and Hamwi estimate weight from a 5 ft baseline plus a per-inch increment. The BMI range uses 18.5-24.9.

heightCm.range: Height must be from 120 to 230 cm.

percentage.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage.intro: Quickly calculate a percent of a number, a share, a change, or a value after increase and discount.

modes.label: Percentage calculation mode
modes.partOfTotal: What percent A is of B

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid numbers.

percent.range: The value is too large to calculate.

base.range: The value is too large to calculate.

part.range: The value is too large to calculate.

total.range: The value is too large to calculate.

oldValue.range: The value is too large to calculate.

newValue.range: The value is too large to calculate.

fraction.title: Fraction Calculator
fraction.intro: Add, subtract, multiply, divide and simplify common fractions.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill fractions with whole numbers. Denominator cannot be 0.

fraction.formula: Fractions use a common denominator for addition and subtraction. The result is sign-normalized and reduced with GCD.

leftNumerator.integer: Numerator must be a whole number.
leftNumerator.range: The value is too large to calculate.

leftDenominator.integer: Denominator must be a whole number.
leftDenominator.range: The value is too large to calculate.

rightNumerator.integer: Numerator must be a whole number.
rightNumerator.range: The value is too large to calculate.

rightDenominator.integer: Denominator must be a whole number.
rightDenominator.range: The value is too large to calculate.

validation.divisionByZero: Cannot divide by a zero fraction.

average.title: Average Calculator
average.intro: Calculate arithmetic mean, median, sum, minimum and maximum for a list of numbers.

form.help: Separate numbers with spaces, lines, semicolons, or comma plus space. Decimal commas such as 1,5 are supported.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter at least one number.

average.formula: Mean = sum of all numbers / count. Median is taken from the sorted list; for an even count it is the average of the two center numbers.

proportion.title: Proportion Calculator
proportion.intro: Solve proportions and the rule of three: if A maps to B, find the value for C.

form.targetHelp: Enter C to find X in A : B = C : X.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the numbers. A cannot be 0.

proportion.formula: Rule of three: X = B × C / A. The coefficient shows how much B maps to one unit of A.

knownLeft.range: The value is too large to calculate.

knownRight.range: The value is too large to calculate.

targetLeft.range: The value is too large to calculate.

equation.title: Equation Calculator
equation.intro: Solve linear and quadratic equations with real roots.

form.quadraticHelp: Enter coefficients a, b and c.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter coefficients as numbers.

formula.linear: Linear equation: x = −b / a. If a = 0, the solution depends on b.
formula.quadratic: Quadratic equation: D = b² − 4ac. D > 0 gives two real roots, D = 0 gives one, D < 0 gives no real roots.

linearA.range: The value is too large to calculate.

linearB.range: The value is too large to calculate.

quadraticA.range: The value is too large to calculate.

quadraticB.range: The value is too large to calculate.

quadraticC.range: The value is too large to calculate.

length.title: Length Converter
length.intro: Convert millimeters, meters, kilometers, inches, feet, yards, and miles through one precise scale.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a number that is 0 or greater.

volume.title: Volume Converter
volume.intro: Convert liters, milliliters, cubic meters, gallons, quarts, cups and spoons.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a volume value.

volume.formula: All values are converted through liters. Gallons, quarts, pints, cups and spoons use US liquid units.

dataSize.title: Data Size Converter
dataSize.intro: Convert bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, gigabytes and terabytes in decimal and binary systems.

modeHint.decimal: Decimal uses 1000 bytes per kilobyte: KB, MB, GB, TB.
modeHint.binary: Binary uses 1024 bytes per kibibyte: KiB, MiB, GiB, TiB.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a data size.

formula.decimal: Decimal: 1 KB = 1000 B, 1 MB = 1000 KB, 1 GB = 1000 MB.
formula.binary: Binary: 1 KiB = 1024 B, 1 MiB = 1024 KiB, 1 GiB = 1024 MiB.

value.required: Enter data size as a number.

speed.title: Speed Converter
speed.intro: Convert km/h, m/s, miles per hour, knots and running pace in min/km.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a valid speed or pace.

speed.formula: Regular speeds are converted through m/s. Pace in min/km is the inverse of speed, so it must be greater than 0.

value.positiveForPace: Pace conversion needs a value greater than 0.

fuel.title: Fuel Consumption
fuel.intro: Calculate fuel consumption, how many liters you need for a trip, or the total trip cost.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid numbers.

fuel.required: Enter fuel amount as a number.
fuel.positive: Fuel amount must be greater than 0.

price.required: Enter price per liter as a number.

tripCost.title: Trip Cost Calculator
tripCost.intro: Estimate fuel, tolls, parking, extra expenses and cost per person.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter valid distance, consumption, price and passengers.

tripCost.formula: Fuel = distance × consumption / 100. Total = fuel × price per liter + tolls + parking + other costs.

passengers.positiveInteger: Passengers must be an integer greater than 0.

fuelPrice.title: Fuel Price Calculator
fuelPrice.intro: Find out how many liters your budget buys and how far that fuel can take you.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive budget, price and consumption.

fuelPrice.formula: Liters = budget / price per liter. Distance = liters / consumption × 100.

pricePerLiter.positive: Price per liter must be greater than 0.

evRange.title: EV Range Calculator
evRange.intro: Estimate electric vehicle range from battery capacity, current charge, consumption and reserve.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive battery and consumption. Charge and reserve must be 0-100%, reserve below current charge.

evRange.formula: Range = (current charge energy − battery reserve) / kWh per 100 km × 100.

batteryCapacityKwh.positive: Battery capacity must be greater than 0.

reservePercent.belowCurrent: Reserve must be below current charge.

averageSpeed.title: Average Speed Calculator
averageSpeed.intro: Calculate average speed from distance and travel time.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive distance and travel time greater than zero.

averageSpeed.formula: Average speed = distance / time. Pace = time / distance.

duration.positive: Travel time must be greater than 0.

vat.title: VAT Calculator
vat.intro: Add VAT on top of a net amount, or extract VAT from a gross amount. Supports 20%, 10%, 0%, or a custom rate.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid numbers.

rate.required: Enter VAT rate as a number.

dateDiff.title: Date Difference
dateDiff.intro: Calculate the number of days, months, and years between two dates. Optionally include the end date.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter valid dates.

direction.future: end date is in the future
direction.past: end date is in the past

age.title: Age Calculator
age.intro: Calculate age on a selected date, total days lived and time until the next birthday.

form.title: Dates
form.description: Enter the birth date and the date to calculate age for.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a valid birth date and calculation date.

age.formula: Age is calculated as full calendar years, then full months and remaining days. For February 29 birthdays, the next birthday is treated as February 28 in non-leap years.

targetDate.beforeBirth: Calculation date cannot be earlier than birth date.

workdays.title: Business Days Calculator
workdays.intro: Count business days and weekend days between two dates, excluding public holidays.

form.title: Date range
form.description: Business days are Monday through Friday.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter valid dates.

workdays.formula: Only weekdays Monday-Friday are counted. Public holidays and shifted days off are not included.

timeDuration.title: Time Duration Calculator
timeDuration.intro: Add and subtract durations in hours, minutes and seconds.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter whole non-negative values for hours, minutes and seconds.

timeDuration.formula: Each duration is converted to seconds. The selected operation is applied, then the result is normalized back to HH:MM:SS.

countdown.title: Countdown Calculator
countdown.intro: Calculate how many days are left until an event or how many days have passed since it.

form.title: Event
form.description: The calculation uses calendar dates and ignores time of day.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter valid dates.

countdown.formula: The difference is calculated between calendar dates. If start date is included, 1 day is added to a non-zero difference.

tips.title: Tip Calculator
tips.intro: Calculate the tip amount and split the bill among multiple people.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid numbers.

billAmount.required: Enter bill amount as a number.

tipPercent.required: Enter tip percent as a number.

peopleCount.positiveInteger: Number of people must be a whole number, at least 1.

temperature.title: Temperature Converter
temperature.intro: Convert temperature between Celsius, Fahrenheit and Kelvin.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a temperature value.

errors.belowAbsoluteZero: Temperature cannot be below absolute zero.

weight.title: Weight Converter
weight.intro: Convert kilograms, grams, tons, pounds, ounces and stones.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a weight value.

billSplit.title: Bill Split Calculator
billSplit.intro: Split a shared bill between people including tips, a service fee and per-person rounding.

form.title: Bill
form.description: Enter the receipt amount and the number of people.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid values.

billSplit.formula: Total = bill + tip + service fee. Per-person amount is rounded up to the selected step so the collected total is not below the bill.

validation.peopleCount: Enter a whole number of people from 1.

roomArea.title: Room Area Calculator
roomArea.intro: Calculate floor, ceiling and wall area for a room, including windows, doors and extra openings.

form.roomHint: The room is treated as rectangular: floor area = length × width.
form.openingsHint: Openings are subtracted from wall area only.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the room dimensions with valid values.

roomArea.formula: Floor area = length × width. Walls = 2 × (length + width) × height − openings. If openings exceed wall area, finish area is shown as 0.

windowsCount.integer: Window count must be an integer.

windowWidth.required: Enter window width as a number.

windowHeight.required: Enter window height as a number.

doorsCount.integer: Door count must be an integer.

doorWidth.required: Enter door width as a number.

doorHeight.required: Enter door height as a number.

extraOpeningsArea.required: Enter openings area as a number.

electricity.title: Electricity Calculator
electricity.intro: Calculate kWh usage and appliance cost from power, time and your electricity tariff.

form.applianceHint: Enter the power of one appliance and the number of matching appliances.
form.usageHint: The tariff is entered manually: time zones, subsidies and add-ons are not included.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid values.

electricity.formula: Daily kWh = power W / 1000 × appliance count × hours per day. Cost = kWh × tariff.

devicesCount.integer: Appliance count must be an integer.
devicesCount.positive: Appliance count must be greater than 0.

hoursPerDay.range: Hours per day must be from 0 to 24.

daysPerMonth.integer: Day count must be an integer.
daysPerMonth.range: Days per month must be from 1 to 31.

cookingUnits.title: Cooking Units Calculator
cookingUnits.intro: Convert milliliters, liters, spoons, cups and fluid ounces for recipes.

note.title: No grams
note.text: Grams depend on the ingredient and density. This calculator converts volume-based kitchen units only.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter an amount.

cookingUnits.formula: All units are converted through milliliters. Household values: 1 tsp = 5 ml, 1 tbsp = 15 ml, 1 cup = 240 ml.

discount.title: Discount Calculator
discount.intro: Calculate the final price after a discount or markup, find the percent change, or recover the original price.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Fill in the fields with valid numbers.

oldPrice.positive: Old price must be greater than 0.

area.title: Area Converter
area.intro: Convert area between square meters, hectares, acres, square feet, and more.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter an area value.
result.squareSide: Side of a square with this area: {value} {unit}

salary.title: Salary Calculator
salary.intro: Calculate net salary after income tax, additional income, and base hourly rate.

form.salaryTaxHint: By default, the Russian progressive personal income tax scale is used: 13%, 15%, 18%, 20%, and 22% only for the income part above each threshold.
form.additionalIncomeHint: For example: renting out an apartment, interest, regular payments, or other income outside salary.

schedule.dayThree: 24h shift then 3 days off — 92 days per year

salary.privacy: Your data is not stored or sent anywhere: the calculation runs only in your browser.
salary.warning: Enter salary before income tax. Your data is not stored or sent anywhere: the calculation runs only in your browser.

result.label: Calculation
result.empty: Check the form values.

formula.rate: rate = income after taxes / ((workdays per year / 12) × hours per day)

taxBreakdown.title: Monthly salary tax
taxBreakdown.note: Shows the monthly withholding when the same gross salary is paid each month.

additionalIncome.required: Enter additional income as a number.

hoursPerWorkDay.positive: Hours per workday must be greater than 0.
hoursPerWorkDay.max: A workday cannot be longer than 24 hours.

customWorkDaysPerYear.max: A year cannot have more than 366 workdays.

projectPrice.title: Project Price Calculator
projectPrice.intro: Estimate a project or side job from rate, hours, complexity, urgency, expenses, and tax.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Check the form values.

formula.price: price = rate × hours × complexity × urgency + expenses + tax

projectHours.required: Enter project hours as a number.

wallpaper.title: Wallpaper Calculator
wallpaper.intro: Calculate how many rolls you need for a room, including windows, doors, waste, and pattern repeat.

form.quickHint: Room sizes and calculations stay only in your browser. Start with the room, then choose the roll size and waste.
form.openingsHint: Openings are subtracted from wall area. If there are none, leave 0.
form.rollHint: Choose a common format or enter the size from the label.
form.patternHint: Pattern repeat increases every strip to the next full repeat of the design.

result.label: Calculation
result.empty: Check the form values.
result.openingsWarning: Openings area is larger than wall area. Check the sizes: the calculation still works, but cover area becomes 0.

basis.area: The result is based on wall area with waste.
basis.strips: The result is based on the number of full strips.

formula.strips: By strips: perimeter / roll width and full strips from each roll.

rollWidth.required: Enter roll width as a number.
rollWidth.positive: Roll width must be greater than 0.

rollLength.required: Enter roll length as a number.
rollLength.positive: Roll length must be greater than 0.

windowsCount.integer: Window count must be an integer.

doorsCount.integer: Door count must be an integer.

windowWidth.required: Enter window width as a number.

windowHeight.required: Enter window height as a number.

doorWidth.required: Enter door width as a number.

doorHeight.required: Enter door height as a number.

patternRepeat.required: Enter pattern repeat as a number.
patternRepeat.positive: Pattern repeat must be greater than 0.

validation.rollTooShort: The roll is shorter than one strip. Check wall height, roll length, or pattern repeat.

paint.title: Paint Calculator
paint.intro: Estimate how many liters and cans of wall paint you need, including windows, doors, coats, coverage and waste.

form.roomHint: Wall area is calculated from room perimeter and wall height.
form.openingsHint: Openings are subtracted from the paintable area.
form.paintHint: Use the coverage rate from the can: it is usually listed as m²/liter for one coat.

result.label: Calculation
result.empty: Check the form values.
result.openingsWarning: Openings area is larger than wall area. Check the sizes: the calculation still works, but paintable area becomes 0.

paint.formula: Liters = paintable area × coats / coverage × (1 + waste). Cans are rounded up to whole packages.

windowsCount.integer: Window count must be an integer.

doorsCount.integer: Door count must be an integer.

windowWidth.required: Enter window width as a number.

windowHeight.required: Enter window height as a number.

doorWidth.required: Enter door width as a number.

doorHeight.required: Enter door height as a number.

canVolume.required: Enter can volume as a number.
canVolume.positive: Can volume must be greater than 0.

paceSpeed.title: Pace to Speed Calculator
paceSpeed.intro: Convert running pace to treadmill speed, or speed back to familiar minutes per kilometer and mile.

form.paceHint: Enter minutes and seconds for 1 km.
form.speedHint: Enter speed in kilometers per hour.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter a positive pace or speed.

formula.paceToSpeed: Speed = 60 / pace in minutes per kilometer.
formula.speedToPace: Pace = 60 / speed in kilometers per hour.

minutes.nonNegativeInteger: Minutes must be an integer greater than or equal to 0.

seconds.range: Seconds must be an integer from 0 to 59.

distancePaceTime.title: Distance Pace Time Calculator
distancePaceTime.intro: Calculate finish time, average pace, or distance for runs and popular race goals.

result.label: Result
result.empty: Enter positive values for the selected mode.

paceMinutes.integer: Pace minutes must be an integer.

paceSeconds.integer: Pace seconds must be an integer.
paceSeconds.range: Pace seconds must be from 0 to 59.

shoeSize.title: Shoe Size Converter
shoeSize.intro: Convert foot length or a known shoe size into EU/RU, UK, US and Mondopoint systems.

form.knownHint: Choose the sizing system and enter the value you already have from the shoe or size chart.

help.cm: Example: 26.5 cm from heel to the longest toe.
help.mondopoint: Example: 265 for a 265 mm foot length.
help.eu: Example: 42 in the European or Russian size scale.
help.uk: Example: 8.5 for an adult UK size.

assumptions.title: Method
assumptions.body: Conversion starts from foot length and rounds to the nearest half size.
assumptions.mondopoint: Mondopoint follows the ISO 9407 idea of marking foot length in millimeters.
assumptions.brand: Brands use different lasts and allowances, so check the manufacturer's chart before buying.

result.label: Sizes
result.empty: Enter a realistic positive value for the selected sizing system.

shoeSize.formula: EU/RU = (foot length + 1.5 cm) × 1.5; UK/US are derived from last length in barleycorns.

value.required: Enter the value as a number.
value.range: The value does not look like a realistic size in the selected system.

clothingSize.title: Clothing Size Converter
clothingSize.intro: Compare approximate clothing sizes across INT, RU, EU, US and UK systems.

form.knownHint: Choose a system and size from a basic adult chart.

assumptions.title: Approximate chart
assumptions.body: This is a basic reference for adult everyday clothing. Brands, fits and garment categories can use different charts.
assumptions.fit: Before buying, compare your measurements with the specific brand chart.

result.label: Sizes
result.empty: Choose a size.

clothingSize.formula: The size is selected from a fixed approximate row; measurements are shown as centimeter ranges.

raceSplit.title: Race Split Calculator
raceSplit.intro: Calculate target pace and checkpoint splits for a race.

result.label: Plan
result.empty: Enter positive distance, target time and split step.

raceSplit.formula: Pace = target time / distance. Split time = checkpoint distance × pace.

splitDistanceKm.positive: Split step must be greater than 0.
splitDistanceKm.tooLarge: Split step cannot be greater than distance.

hours.integer: Hours must be a whole number, 0 or greater.

minutes.integer: Minutes must be a whole number, 0 or greater.

seconds.integer: Seconds must be a whole number, 0 or greater.

duration.positive: Target time must be greater than 0.

metronome.title: Metronome
metronome.intro: Set BPM, rhythm and cadence reference for running, walking, warm-ups or drills.

form.rhythmHint: Sound starts only after a click, so the browser does not block audio.
form.audioHint: The first start may require allowing sound on the device.

result.label: Rhythm
result.empty: Enter whole values: BPM 30-260, bar 1-12, duration 1-180 minutes.

metronome.formula: Interval = 60,000 / BPM. If each beat marks every other step, target cadence is BPM × 2.

bpm.range: BPM must be a whole number from 30 to 260.

beatsPerBar.range: Beats per bar must be from 1 to 12.

durationMinutes.range: Duration must be from 1 to 180 minutes.

heartRateZones.title: Heart Rate Zones
heartRateZones.intro: Calculate training heart rate zones from age, maximum heart rate, or heart rate reserve.

form.maxHint: Leave empty to estimate maximum heart rate as 220 − age.

z1.title: Zone 1: Slow run
z1.description: Recovery, warm-up and very easy longer efforts.

z2.title: Zone 2: Easy pace
z2.description: Aerobic base work: speaking in short phrases is still possible.

z3.title: Zone 3: Tempo run
z3.description: Moderately hard work for sustained pace.

z5.title: Zone 5: VO2 max
z5.description: Short very hard intervals close to maximum effort.

result.label: Zones
result.empty: Check age, maximum heart rate and resting heart rate.

formula.max: Zone = maximum heart rate × intensity percentage.
formula.reserve: Zone = resting heart rate + (maximum heart rate − resting heart rate) × intensity percentage.

age.range: Age must be from 10 to 100 years.

maxHeartRate.range: Maximum heart rate must be from 80 to 240 bpm.

restingHeartRate.range: Resting heart rate must be from 30 to 120 bpm.
restingHeartRate.belowMax: Resting heart rate must be lower than maximum heart rate.

brick.title: Brick Calculator
brick.intro: Estimate bricks, masonry volume, mortar, waste and purchase cost.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive wall and brick dimensions. Openings must be smaller than wall area.

brick.formula: Bricks = masonry area / visible brick face with joint × wall thickness, then waste is added.

wallLength.positive: Wall length must be greater than 0.

wallHeight.positive: Wall height must be greater than 0.

openingsArea.tooLarge: Openings must be smaller than wall area.

brickLengthMm.positive: Brick length must be greater than 0.

brickWidthMm.positive: Brick width must be greater than 0.

brickHeightMm.positive: Brick height must be greater than 0.

thicknessBricks.positive: Wall thickness must be greater than 0.

blocks.title: Block Calculator
blocks.intro: Estimate aerated concrete or foam blocks for a wall: quantity, masonry volume, adhesive, waste and cost.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive wall and block dimensions. Openings must be smaller than wall area.

blocks.formula: Blocks = masonry area / block face area, then waste and round up. Adhesive use is entered manually.

wallLength.positive: Wall length must be greater than 0.

wallHeight.positive: Wall height must be greater than 0.

openingsArea.tooLarge: Openings must be smaller than wall area.

blockLengthMm.positive: Block length must be greater than 0.

blockHeightMm.positive: Block height must be greater than 0.

blockWidthMm.positive: Block thickness must be greater than 0.

bagWeightKg.positive: Bag weight must be greater than 0.

drywall.title: Drywall Calculator
drywall.intro: Estimate drywall sheets, frame profiles, screws, waste and purchase cost.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive wall and sheet dimensions. Openings must be smaller than wall area.

drywall.formula: Sheets = sheathing area × layers × (1 + waste / 100) / sheet area, rounded up.

wallLength.positive: Wall length must be greater than 0.

wallHeight.positive: Wall height must be greater than 0.

openingsArea.tooLarge: Openings must be smaller than wall area.

sheetWidth.positive: Sheet width must be greater than 0.

sheetHeight.positive: Sheet height must be greater than 0.

layers.positiveInteger: Layers must be a whole number greater than 0.

studSpacingMm.positive: Stud spacing must be greater than 0.

screwsPerSheet.positiveInteger: Screws must be a whole number greater than 0.

putty.title: Putty Calculator
putty.intro: Estimate putty or plaster mix by area, layer thickness, bags, waste and price.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive area, layer thickness, consumption and bag weight. Excluded area must be smaller than total area.

putty.formula: Mix = work area × layer thickness × kg/m²/mm consumption × (1 + waste / 100), then rounded up to whole bags.

excludedArea.belowGross: Excluded area must be smaller than total area.

layerThicknessMm.positive: Layer thickness must be greater than 0.

bagWeightKg.positive: Bag weight must be greater than 0.

insulation.title: Insulation Calculator
insulation.intro: Estimate insulation boards, packs, purchased area, volume, leftover and cost.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive area, board dimensions, thickness and boards per pack.

insulation.formula: Boards = work area × (1 + waste / 100) / board area, then rounded up to whole packs.

excludedArea.belowGross: Excluded area must be smaller than total area.

boardLengthM.positive: Board length must be greater than 0.

boardWidthM.positive: Board width must be greater than 0.

boardsPerPack.positiveInteger: Boards per pack must be a whole number greater than 0.

concrete.title: Concrete Calculator
concrete.intro: Estimate concrete volume for a rectangular pour, waste, dry-mix bags and approximate cost.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive length, width, thickness and bag yield. Waste and price cannot be negative.

concrete.formula: Volume = length × width × thickness in meters × (1 + waste / 100). Bags are rounded up by yield in liters.

bagYieldLiters.positive: Bag yield must be greater than 0.

pricePerM3.nonNegative: Price per m³ cannot be negative.

stripFoundation.title: Strip Foundation Calculator
stripFoundation.intro: Estimate concrete volume, sand base, formwork and longitudinal rebar for a strip foundation.

warning.title: Approximate estimate
warning.body: This calculator only estimates materials from the entered geometry. It does not verify soil bearing, frost depth, loads, concrete grade or reinforcement design.
warning.norms: Use an engineered design, local codes and professional review before construction.

form.geometryHint: Enter the total length of all external and internal strip sections.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive strip and rebar dimensions. Base, waste and prices cannot be negative.

stripFoundation.formula: Concrete = length × width × height × (1 + waste / 100). Formwork = length × height × 2. Rebar mass ≈ length × d² / 162.

totalLengthM.positive: Total length must be greater than 0.

rebarRuns.integer: Bar count must be a whole number greater than 0.

rebarDiameterMm.positive: Rebar diameter must be greater than 0.

tile.title: Tile Calculator
tile.intro: Estimate surface area, tile count, boxes, cutting waste and purchase cost.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive surface, tile and box values.

tile.formula: Tiles = surface area / one tile area, then waste is added and the count is rounded up to whole boxes.

tileLengthCm.positive: Tile length must be greater than 0.

tileWidthCm.positive: Tile width must be greater than 0.

tilesPerBox.positiveInteger: Tiles per box must be an integer greater than 0.

laminate.title: Laminate Calculator
laminate.intro: Estimate floor area, laminate packs, cutting waste, leftover coverage and purchase cost.

form.packHint: Pack coverage is usually printed on the laminate box.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive room dimensions and pack coverage.

laminate.formula: Packs = (room area − excluded area) × (1 + waste / 100) / pack coverage, then rounded up.

excludedArea.belowGross: Excluded area must be smaller than room area.

packCoverage.positive: Pack coverage must be greater than 0.

floorScreed.title: Floor Screed Calculator
floorScreed.intro: Estimate screed volume, dry mix weight, bags, waste allowance and purchase cost.

form.consumptionHint: Consumption depends on the exact product. Check the value on the bag or data sheet.

result.label: Estimate
result.empty: Enter positive dimensions, thickness, consumption and bag weight.

floorScreed.formula: Mix = area × thickness in mm × consumption kg/m²/mm × (1 + waste / 100), then rounded up to whole bags.

excludedArea.belowGross: Excluded area must be smaller than room area.

consumptionKgPerM2Mm.positive: Mix consumption must be greater than 0.

bagWeight.positive: Bag weight must be greater than 0.

unitPrice.title: Unit Price Calculator
unitPrice.intro: Compare packages by price per kilogram, liter, or piece and choose the better deal.

form.hint: The calculator converts price to one base unit: kilogram, liter, or piece. That makes different packages easier to compare.
form.name: Name

result.label: Comparison
result.empty: Fill in at least one product to see the unit price.
result.mixedWarning: Compare products within the same unit group: weight with weight, volume with volume, pieces with pieces.
result.noWinnerMixed: Products from different groups are calculated separately, so no overall winner is selected.
result.noWinnerSingle: Add a second valid product in the same group to choose the better deal.

unitPrice.formula: Unit price = package price / amount in the base unit.

install.title: Keep this calculator handy
install.iosStep3: Choose Add to Home Screen and save the shortcut.
install.androidStep3: Choose Add to Home screen or Install app.
